description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED review of TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 execution results. AUDITOR must review governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch, confirm all pass assertions against actual workflow files and ledger artifacts, and issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED to close the smoke E2E loop before advancing to the next roadmap phase.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json present on main branch with all checks passing and commit SHA 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9 referenced; AUDITOR VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED event recorded in governance/ledger/ for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001
